source_name: ATO Petroleum Resource Rent Tax policy
notes: Policy-rate envelope. PRRT applies to taxable petroleum-project profit. It is not a gross export tax and is not the same thing as company income tax or state royalties.
source_rights: Commonwealth copyright; ATO website terms apply
citation: Australian Taxation Office, Petroleum resource rent tax.

fields.basis: taxable profit of a petroleum project
fields.not_captured: This envelope does not show PRRT receipts, project-level liabilities, carried-forward deductions, uplift rates or company-level tax paid.
